summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of Veracity Technologies multi-industry landing page update. All 13 specified features successfully implemented and working correctly.
passed_tests: Hero headline correctly reads 'Stop Downtime Before It Stops Your Business.'
Hero subhead mentions all 4 industries (construction, financial services, manufacturing, high-compliance)
Stats section has 4 correct cards: Construction (41%), All Industries (75%), Financial ($4.9M), Manufacturing (#1)
Why Specialized IT heading mentions 'regulated, operational industries'
Our Approach mentions multi-industry tools: Procore, Sage, Bloomberg, SAP
Case Study shows 3 testimonial cards from Construction, Financial Services, Manufacturing
Case Study has 4 metric cards (0 downtime, 60 day, 80%, 100%)
Audit section heading says 'Free Technology & Cyber Risk Audit' (no 'Construction')
Risk Reversal says 'favorite industry charity' not 'construction charity'
FAQ includes questions about multiple industries and compliance support
FAQ accordion expand/collapse functionality works correctly
Form submission shows success state correctly
